programme.desc: 'S3/E20 - Here Come Da Judge'. Michael Kyle is a modern-day patriarch who rules his household with a unique parenting style. As he teaches his children life lessons, he does so with his own brand of humorous wisdom.

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: 'S8/E4 - Hoop Dreams'. Jack gets a job as the locker room attendant for the Los Angeles Lakers. Dre and Bow feel like they need to step in before his job goes to his head.

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: 'S8/E5 - Ashy To Classy'. Dre overreacts to Devante leaving the house. Ashy and Bow intervene, making the situation worse. Jack makes a bold outfit choice for picture day.

programme.title: College Hill: Celebrity Drop Outs
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Back in the Saddle'. The roommates find themselves on opposite sides of the courtroom for Intro to Law.

programme.title: Behind The Story

programme.title: The Westbrooks
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - #Making The Brand'. The five insta-famous WestBrooks sisters decide to throw a pool party to kick-off their brand. Youngest sister, India, is dogged by scandalous Internet photos from a past fling.

programme.title: The Westbrooks
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - #Manager Meltdown'. As India and Crystal look to expand their visibility, they clash with their manager. Tempers flare between sister roommates Morgan and Brooke over their living situation.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Los Angeles
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - All Will Bee Revealed'. As the day of reckoning dawns, KP, Tim, Star and Cory are surprised by who shows up at the IAM shop willing to work. Vudu meets with her biological father for the first time since childhood.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: 'Russia's Shadow Fleet'. A 'shadow fleet' of aging tankers is keeping Russian oil flowing. Bloomberg set out to uncover the network of intermediaries working to sell the Kremlin's oil while getting rich in the process.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: 'The Dark Side Of TikTok'. TikTok's secret algorithm has been blamed for sending young users content that pushes some into a spiral of self-harm. We take a look at the darker side of the world's most downloaded app.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: 'S4/E37 - The Dos and Don'ts Badge'. The Squirrels are causing a bit too much mess in the clubhouse, so Duggee explains that they need to think more carefully about what they are doing.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: 'S4/E15 - The Ambition Badge'. Duggee masters his ambition of building a model of the Clubhouse out of sticks. This encourages the Squirrels to think of their own ambitions, and how they can achieve them.

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: 'S1/E59 - More About Up'. The Twirlywoos watch children let balloons go. The Twirlywoos have a go and float up to the stars! The Piece of Paper visits and folds itself into stairs and the Twirlywoos climb up!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S1/E81 - Give It Back'. Tinky Winky and Dipsy both want a go with Tinky Winky's bag and start to squabble. The Noo-­-noo sucks up the bag and only gives it back when Tinky Winky and Dipsy are ready to share.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S1/E86 - This Way That Way'. The Teletubbies go 'this way, that way' on a Tubby Car journey to the Hidey Hup. The Tubby Spinny goes 'this way, that way' too.

programme.title: In The Night Garden ZinkyZonk Specials
programme.desc: When the toys of the Night Garden cant sleep, the Zonk leads them to the ZonkyZoney, an enchanted grove where they can zinkyzzzonk in peace.

programme.title: Justin's House
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Suits You Justin'. Justin is going out to dinner, but he has played football in his best suit. Can he get it clean in time?

programme.title: Justin's House
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Auntie Justina Visits'. Auntie Justina is paying a visit, and everything needs to be spick and span with Little Monster well and truly out of the way.

programme.title: Mister Maker Around the World
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. The artistic adventurer creates waves on an Australian beach and cooks up a tasty surprise in the UK.

programme.title: Mister Maker Around the World
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. The globetrotter travels to Australia where he samples an egg dish.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E47 - Helping Dad'. The twins help wallpaper their parents' bedroom with dad, but he is not very good at decorating...

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E48 - Washing Mossy'. Mummy is away and Dad is going to play football, so Grandma comes over to babysit.

programme.desc: 'S8/E13 - Ye Old Piratey Butlaarrrs'. Captain Captain has been reading about how captains of yonder years had 'butlaarrrs' in the Olde Book of Piratey Historrry. Captain Captain wonders if Sandy and Seaweed could try being her butlers!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E23 - Postman Pat and the Tremendous Tree'. Pat has a very unusual delivery today - an enormous tree which Alf has ordered for Thompson Ground.

programme.title: Grace's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: 'S4/E9 - Balance Machines'. Grace looks at three amazing balance machines: a velodrome bike, electric rollerskates and a hoverboard.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Episode 9'. Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the rock of Gibraltar, in Europe, to count all the barbary macaques that live there.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: 'S22/E9'. While he is working on the Chinese Railway, Thomas tries to save an accident-prone truck who is racing down the tracks.

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Noddy and the Case of Deltoid's Strange Behaviour'. Noddy finds out that Deltoid has lost all his memories and doesn't recognise any of his friends any more. Can Noddy solve the problem and replace Deltoid's memory chip?

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E19 - Postman Pat and the Rubber Duck Race'. It's time for the annual Greendale Duck Race. When the racing ducks that Pat is delivering go missing, Greendale help Pat to save the day.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - The Claw'. When Bluey and Bingo are unable to grab a prize on a Magic Claw machine, Mum and Dad create their own version at home. But Dad isn't about to make winning easy.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Markets'. When Bluey visits the markets with five bucks from the tooth fairy, the options are endless. But as she and Indy look for the perfect purchase, spending it proves hard.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Blue Mountains'. Bluey, Bingo, Mum and Dad play a game of hand puppets, exploring the land beyond the Blue Mountains where they outsmart the Cheeky Fox to find the softest ever beds.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E49 - Asparagus'. Dad tells Bluey to mind her manners at the table - they're not animals. But when Bluey gets her hands on a stick of magic asparagus, she shows them everyone's got a wild side.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Spooky Day'. Supertato runs in fright when Pumpkin tries to make friends with him, but later realises she needs his help as she's stuck in the air hanging from balloons set up by Evil Pea.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Episode 12'. Follow the adventures of Supertato, the world's first potato superhero as he tackles the mischievous Evil Pea, in the supermarket aisles.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E55 - Dance Mode'. After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo is given three chances to put Mum and Dad in 'Dance Mode' as payback. But the others can't resist taking Bingo's turns for her.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E53 - Hammerbarn'. On a trip to Hammerbarn, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. But Bluey quickly gets jealous of her neighbour, Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Featherwand'. Bluey and Mum are off to Chloe's party and Bingo isn't invited. But armed with a magic featherwand that makes things incredibly heavy, Bingo can now stop them leaving the house.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E56 - Squash'. When dad and Uncle Stripe play a game of squash, Bluey and Bingo are in control of their every move, and Bingo proves that big siblings don't always beat little siblings.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E63 - Hairdressers'. During a game of hairdressers, Bluey discovers that big-headed customer Dad has nits! To help treat them Bingo has to find her voice, while Bluey has to find her ears.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Band Together'. The Alphablocks are back on the road in a special alphabetical adventure from A to Z. Can they get the band back together in time for the big concert?

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Hospital'. Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very curious x-ray from Nurse Bingo. It seems he has a cat in his tummy!

programme.title: Hoffman Family Gold

programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Morgan Aero Coupe'. Ever wondered how a Morgan Aero Coupe was made? Join the How It's Made crew as they go to its birthplace, explore the inner workings and its gorgeous exterior.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Wisconsin Washout'. The homestead of musician Lou and partner Stacey is threatened by water erosion and at serious risk from a torrential rainstorm. The Raneys come to the rescue.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - High Country Bear Lair'. The Counters moved to a remote plot in Colorado for much-needed tranquillity. But two years in, their crops are failing, and their teenage kids are bored.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: 'S17/E5'. A Chipping Norton barbershop hides an incredible antiques emporium. In an Anglesey salt factory, Drew and Tee discover an unusual bread and cheese cupboard.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: 'S17/E6'. Modern day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the UK in search of weird and wonderful objects. The bigger the hoard, the happier he is.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S24/E26 - Wooden Utensils, Transport Refrigeration Units'. How are everyday objects made? Common items including Moccasins, Electronic Impact Drills go under the microscope.

programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Morgan Aero Coupe'. Ever wondered how a Morgan Aero Coupe was made? Join the How It's Made crew as they go to its birthplace, explore the inner workings and its gorgeous exterior.

programme.desc: 'S17/E9 - Mitsubishi Shogun'. The boys snap up a Mitsubishi Shogun. If Elvis can sort out the car's rust, he'll upgrade its off-roading capability with a lift and some accessories.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: 'S17/E10 - MGB Roadster'. The boys are determined to mark the MGB's 60th anniversary in style by buying and fixing up one of these classic motors. But the upgrades come with some hefty costs.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: 'S17/E7'. Drew's ability to work under pressure is tested by talented dealer, Alasdair. In a stunning disused church, Drew bids on an elaborate Victorian mirror.

programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Life Or Death In Michigan'. The Dagues moved to Michigan's wilderness. But they have no power, predators killed their chickens and all their water must be hand-pumped from a well.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: 'S4/E11 - Sparks Fly'. Sparks fly at Tom's camp as a worker showdown threatens the project. Later, a bear attack leaves Jodi on edge at Creig's camp.

programme.desc: 'S10/E10 - Colombian Cave Women'. In this all-female tribe's challenge, two veteran survivalists return to mentor two newcomers on the perils of San José Del Guaviare, Colombia, for 21 days.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid XL
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Hike Into Hell'. Three of the remaining teams trek through the dense, snake-filled jungle. The journey quickly turns to chaos and one survivalist must be medically evacuated.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid XL
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - Jeff's Worst Nightmare'. With the extraction day looming, two more critical survivalists struggle. Plus, Jeff changes strategy but a medical emergency stops him in his tracks.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S4/E94 - Magnet in the Moat/Motsuki Bugs Out'. Luna and Motsuki drop Luna's magnet in the moat - and are silly enough to accept Octobella'a help getting it. Motsuki gets angry at being told she's too 'buggy' to be in charge.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S2/E35 - Hats and Hares/ Forget-me-now'. Hattie worries that Dad Hatter and March Hare's hat designs are too bonkers for the royal family. Alice hears the tune of a Forget-Me-Now flower and forgets all her recipes.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S2/E37 - A Knight to Remember/ Roaring Daisylions'. Alice meets Kyra, a knight in The Looking Glass, whom The Silver Queen asks to lead the Pawn Guards. Daisy and Dandy's buds don't want to eat and Alice bakes a creative solution.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S2/E38 - Dance of the Cherry Blossoms/ Alice and the Carpenter'. On Hanami, Alice takes a cherry blossom named Sakura on a tour of Wonderland. Alice makes one of Cookie's challenging recipes.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Rocket Rhino!/Trick or Trace-e'. When The Spidey Team is planning to stop Green Goblin, he manages to throw the heroes' plans off course. A new super-powered spidey-jetback ends up in the hands of Rhino!

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Bug in the System/Test Your Strength'. Doc Ock sends her favorite octo-bot, CAL, to infiltrate WEB-Quarters with a new invention. Spidey reminds Hulk to use self-control after Rhino challenges him to a strength contest.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Cat-astrophe/Swing with a Stomp'. Bootsie gets lost at the Cat Show and Doc Ock turns her into a super-sized, monster kitty! During the concert, Doc Ock steals the drumset and uses it to hypnotize the entire audience!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S2/E43 - Kooky Paleontologist!, The/ That's My Jam!'. Kooky Scientist Von Drake whisks the gang off to Prehistoric World to find hot lava to repair their game! The gang embarks on a journey to gather instruments for a big jam session.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S2/E44 - Dino Safari'. The gang visits Prehistoric World to dino-sit T-Top and some dinosaur eggs. When the dino eggs start hatching and running loose, the weasels sneak in to get a dino-pet.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S2/E45 - King Ludwig's Day Off/No Horsing Around'. King Ludwig spends the day at the Funhouse, so he can do things all by himself. Minnie and Daisy have new horses for a show. Daisy learns to take care of her horse.

programme.title: Eureka!
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Ferreka/Peppereka'. A pack of veggie-stealing bronto ferrets use Eureka's new watering system to get in her garden. When Barry discovers the girls' names make 'Peppereka,' Pepper gets carried away.

programme.title: Eureka!
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Dance Dance Evolution/Barry on'. The Rocky Falls kids learn a new dance for school and everyone is able to master the routine except for Pepper! Barry wants to be like his dad, the town's 'Fix-It Man'.

programme.title: Eureka!
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Rocky Falls Picture Show/The Swamp of Lost Toys'. Barry is painting KB's portrait for the Cave Library's 'Hall of Creatures', but KB won't sit still! Eureka accidentally loses her pencil in the Sticky Spiky Swamp.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S2/E37 - Just Plane Quackers/Frannie Takes Flight!'. Daisy is afraid to fly with the gang in an air rally over the Adventure Worlds. Farfus' little sister, Frannie the griffin, is ready to fly but is really nervous.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S2/E56 - Crystal Clearwater Vs. the Annoying Algae / Trolland's Big Adventure'. The gang needs Crystal Clearwater's help when discovering the Weasels have brought an invasive species. Trolland goes on an epic adventure.

programme.title: Kiya & The Kimoja Heroes
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - It Takes a Kimoja Village/ Motsie's Space Race'. Jay takes over a community scavenger hunt. When Motsie learns that Haddy has invented a spray that gives her supersonic speed, Motsie feels she must keep up with her nemesis.

programme.title: Bluey

programme.desc: Scientist Sherman Klump's inventions, his upcoming marriage to his pretty colleague Denise Gaines and his reputation are threatened by his evil clone Buddy Love.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Two women troubled with guy-problems swap homes in each other's countries, where they each meet a local guy and fall in love.

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: God contacts Congressman Evan Baxter and tells him to build an ark in preparation for a great flood.

programme.title: Happiness Is A Four Letter Word
programme.desc: In this uplifting South African romantic drama, three friends try to find love, happiness and success in Johannesburg.

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: The party heads to New Orleans for an ensemble cast in this acclaimed comedy. On a wild reunion trip, four lifelong friends find romance, sisterhood and absolute chaos.

programme.desc: Starring multi award winning actresses, Lillan Dube and Brumilda van Rensburg. Chemo Club is a modern classic comedy.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Norway'. In Norway we follow a train journey that begins in the capital Oslo and heads all the way to Bodo inside the Arctic Circle. The first leg is the Dovre line, running from to the remote northern wonderland of Trondheim.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S7/E3 - Buses'. The red double-decker bus is a global icon. They carry millions of passengers every day across the capital, and Gregg Wallace has special access to a bus-building factory in Scarborough, Yorkshire.

programme.title: 21 Day Body Turnaround with Michael...
programme.desc: '21 Day Body Turnaround with Michael Mosley. S1/E3'. ...Mosley. Dr Michael Mosley reunites five volunteers, who lost a Stone in 21 Days.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S9/E9 - Uruguay'. Ben Fogle meets Rhona Mitra who has swapped her home in Hollywood for a remote farmhouse in Uruguay.

programme.title: Engineering Reborn
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. In Hong Kong, a WW2 detention centre is transformed into a university. And in Wisconsin, USA, and old polluting power station is re-engineered into a student facility.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Norway'. In Norway we follow a train journey that begins in the capital Oslo and heads all the way to Bodo inside the Arctic Circle. The first leg is the Dovre line, running from to the remote northern wonderland of Trondheim.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S7/E2 - Trains'. Gregg gets special access to learn how the ultimate train is made: a huge 187-tonne, five-carriage electric train. Meanwhile, Cherry Healey visits an HS2 construction site.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S7/E3 - Buses'. The red double-decker bus is a global icon. They carry millions of passengers every day across the capital, and Gregg Wallace has special access to a bus-building factory in Scarborough, Yorkshire.

programme.title: Deadly Mission Shark
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Nurse Sharks'. It's time to celebrate, as Steve Backshall's team of ten shark saviours have all passed their dive training and are now fully qualified scuba divers.

programme.title: Engineering Reborn
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. First constructed in the 1930s, the West Side Line - an elevated viaduct section of the New York Central Railroad - was abandoned in the 1980s. But since 2009 it's been totally revitalised.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S9/E5 - Creature of The Night'. In the midst of dark winter, Arctic residents must brace for the dangers that lurk in the constant darkness.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S7/E4'. Ben travels to Sri Lanka where he meets Janey, a vet from the North-East of England, who runs a charitable clinic focused on helping the street dogs that roam the island.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Norway'. In Norway we follow a train journey that begins in the capital Oslo and heads all the way to Bodo inside the Arctic Circle. The first leg is the Dovre line, running from to the remote northern wonderland of Trondheim.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S7/E3 - Buses'. The red double-decker bus is a global icon. They carry millions of passengers every day across the capital, and Gregg Wallace has special access to a bus-building factory in Scarborough, Yorkshire.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S9/E9 - Uruguay'. Ben Fogle meets Rhona Mitra who has swapped her home in Hollywood for a remote farmhouse in Uruguay.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: 'S7/E8 - Trigger, Fury and Raven'. Police dog Trigger has crushed sciatic nerves, feisty kitten Fury has a suspected tibia injury, and will shepherd doodle Raven get a new hip?

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S5/E9'. A wind driven wildfire consumes a Colorado neighbourhood. In New Mexico, freezing conditions trap 21 people in an ice-covered tram car.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S7/E5 - Sweden'. Ben travels to Sweden to meet Annalisa, the Italian chose a life on the streets of Europe as a teenager, and now is developing a forest hideaway on the fringes of Swedish society for her and her toddler.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S9/E6 - Whiteout'. With limited daylight, Alaskans must brave cruel temperatures to secure their survival. Storms make essentials like finding water supplies and pelts urgent.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S5/E10'. Wildfires in Oregon, flash floods in Arizona, a family survive the most powerful typhoon to hit the Philippines and a story of survival in sub-zero temperatures for seven days in the Canadian Rockies.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S11/E19 - Respect the Wild'. Alaskans power through the dog days of summer.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: 'S7/E9 - Kylo and Sasha'. Noel treats beloved fluff monster, ten-month-old rough collie Kylo, who has deformities in his elbows and wrists, and golden retriever pup Sasha, whose bones are digging into her paw.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys

programme.title: Engineering Reborn

programme.title: Life Below Zero

programme.desc: 'S11/E3 - On the Auroras'. Alaskans confront the environment, and themselves, as winter bears down.

programme.title: Everyday Cooking
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Chicken And Clam Paella'. Samantha Seneviratne makes chicken and clam paella, a surprisingly easy one-pan meal that's as delicious as it is fun to share.

programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Honey Chicken And Apple Tart'. Samantha Seneviratne shares an easy meal that puts a fresh spin with natural sweetness on a simple chicken dinner and an elegant, but simple, dessert.

programme.title: Everyday Cooking

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Rise of the Empress'. On the Volcano Island, Po and the Kids are reunited with Li, Grandma, Ping, Rooster, Wing, and Wong, and work together to find out what's really going on the island.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Bridge Over Troubled Lava'. The whole gang escapes pursing Guards, battles flowing lava, and survives crumbling caves and pillars to finally make it back to the Forbidden City.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - House of Flying Pandas'. The gang learns of even bigger and direr forces working against the Empress and the Kingdom of China, and must put a stop to it before it is too late.

programme.title: Where's Wally?
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Costa Rica... IN COLOR'. Wenda, a bird-lover with great knowledge of rare birds, notices that the birds in Costa Rica have lost their color! Waldo and Wenda head to the rainforest to investigate.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Scimitar'. While searching for items missing from the treasure house, Puss enlists the help of the Scimitar, an evil sword that turns its wielder wicked.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Stories'. Artephius and the orphans are alone in town when a Celtic thunder god demands to be let into the treasure house - or he will destroy San Lorenzo!

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Sphere'. A piece of treasure that belongs to the Mole King is missing, and he won't give it up unless Puss helps him reunite with his ex-girlfriend.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Baby Face Off/The Pursuit Of Wrinkliness'. Thunk babysits Sandy and new baby Cliff to prove he is responsible. /Gran worries that Thunk isn't tough enough to survive to adulthood o she puts him through some tests.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Croodtopia/Hand On A Hard Egg'. When the adults come down with the sneezles, the kids use the chance to create their own society with no rules/Food is scarce. A large egg is spotted. Everybody wants it.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Disaster Of Puppets/Love Will Eep Us Together'. Thunk invents ventriloquism when he tries at stand-up comedy/Eep is determined for two buffalippos to find love when Grug denies her dating privileges.

programme.desc: 'S1/E1 of 8 - German Bomber in Liverpool'. Britain's foremost amateur WWII detectorist, Stephen Taylor, joins forces with Madness frontman Suggs to uncover and analyse historical finds from across the UK.

programme.title: Forged In Fire
programme.desc: 'S5/E15 - The Anthropomorphic Sword'. Two smiths head back to their home forges to recreate an iconic ancient iron weapon: the Celtic Anthropomorphic Sword.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S23/E12 of 25 - Appetite For Pawnstruction'. Corey has an appetite for a deal when a Guns N' Roses collector box rocks into the shop. But will Corey end up in Paradise City, or out in the cold November rain?

programme.title: Storage Wars Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Schlock Therapy'. Roy antagonises the buyers at an auction in Don Mills with free psychological analysis. Ursula tries to rein in Paul's reckless bidding habits while Bogart's away making wedding plans.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 of 6 - The Bulge'. Stunning, newly colourised combat and newsreel footage plus personal memoirs take us to the heart of a battle that would be a catastrophic blow to both sides and leave a muddy graveyard across East Belgium.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 of 6 - Berlin'. Rare newsreel and amateur footage, newly colorised, take us inside Hitler's crumbling empire and onto the front lines of the firefight for the streets of Berlin.

programme.title: Secrets In The Sand
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Croc Mummies And The Lost City Of Avaris'. On the western bank of the Nile, the remains of ten ancient crocodiles are excavated. The mystery of millions of circles of grass in the Namib Desert might finally be solved.

programme.title: My History Moments
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - No Black And White'. TV Professional Gugu Aseda tells of her childhood in a volatile township during Apartheid. She grew up amidst gunfire, yet learnt a beautiful life lesson.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - End Of The Line'. Salvaging a motor yacht in Islamorda and a launch hung up on a dam on the Mississippi River, and repairing a major storm gate in the British Isles.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: 'S6/E16 - The God Particle'. It's been called the key to the universe and the most important scientific breakthrough of all time. Could the so-called 'God Particle' reveal the truth of our origins?

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: 'S14/E1 of 20 - The Disclosure Event'. In 2021, the United States government broke a 70-year precedent of denying UFOs. Will we soon discover that they are, in fact, of extraterrestrial origin?

programme.title: Storage Wars Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Kennys Vs Kennys'. Roy brings along Bogart's sisters to try and throw him off at the auction. Meanwhile, Ursula is in a bad mood and the others try to take advantage.

programme.title: Storage Wars Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Roy Dirnbeck: The Roy'. After months of waiting for Cindy to set a wedding date, Rick makes a bold move at an auction. Roy records his memoirs for posterity. Ursula finds a new place to stash her booze.

programme.title: Forged In Fire
programme.desc: 'S5/E15 - The Anthropomorphic Sword'. Two smiths head back to their home forges to recreate an iconic ancient iron weapon: the Celtic Anthropomorphic Sword.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S23/E14 of 25 - Wreck It Rick'. Rick and Chum kick it with a rare pair of Pumas from 1968. But will a shocking sticker price leave them in the dust, or can they race their way to a deal?

programme.title: Storage Wars Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Cougar Pants'. Cindy and Rick go on the prowl for fresh lockers at an auction in downtown Toronto. Unforeseen expenses force Ursula to reconsider her attitude towards stripping. Roy crashes hard.

programme.title: Storage Wars Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Confessions Of A Dangerous Mime'. Much to his own amusement (and no one else's), Roy brings a mime to an auction. Rick and Cindy arrive in a fouler mood than usual, and Bogart hopes to whip Paul into shape.

programme.title: Storage Wars Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - Utopia?'. The buyers head to the tiny hamlet of Utopia, hoping that the auction lives up to its name. Roy has a pocket full of cash and he's not afraid to bribe, and Ursula runs afoul of some fowl.

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars

programme.desc: Love and dreams collide in this rom-com. A sous-chef at New York's top restaurant is invited to judge a food competition for a prominent fundraiser. The event unearths an old flame.

programme.title: Making Scents Of Love
programme.desc: A lovely romantic film. A perfume chemist accidentally spills her perfume on a guy, who instantly falls for her. Is it true love, or has she concocted a love potion?

programme.title: The Wedding Fix
programme.desc: A delightful rom-com. An over-planner tries to get over a breakup by helping plan a friend's wedding with the aid of the groom's best man. What will their partnership yield?

programme.title: Dodger
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Waxwork'. Gang member Tom returns to find his bed taken by the new boy, whilst a dangerous money-making opportunity arises at Queen Victoria's Madam Tussauds waxwork unveiling.

programme.title: Felix & The Treasure Of Morgaa
programme.desc: A great animated film for the whole family. Felix, a twelve-year-old boy, sets out to find his father, whom he believes is still alive two years after he went missing at sea.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Shark Boy...
programme.desc: 'The Adventures Of Shark Boy And Lava Girl'. Robert Rodriguez writes and directs this amazing adventure film. A young boy is recruited by his imaginary friends to help save the world.

programme.title: The Snow Queen & The Princess
programme.desc: A fantasy-filled animation. Ayla, the daughter of the Snow Queen, accidentally unleashes evil Ice Spirits. To save the day, Ayla gathers a team of true friends.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: The Secrets...
programme.desc: 'Fantastic Beasts: The Secrets Of Dumbledore'. Eddie Redmayne returns for this epic third instalment. Dumbledore assigns Newt and his allies with a mission related to Grindelwald's rising power.

programme.title: Ghoster
programme.desc: An adventure-filled family fantasy. A girl and her father must unravel the secrets of Echoville Manor which has held the world's cutest spirit Ghoster captive for 50 years.

programme.title: Are You There God? It's Me, Margaret
programme.desc: A heartfelt coming-of-age film based on the book. When her family moves to the suburbs, 11-year-old Margaret begins her new life and adolescence.

icon.src: https://03mcdecdnimagerepository.blob.core.windows.net/epguideimage/img/370437_ARE YOU THERE GOD_ IT'S ME, MARGARET_2023_01.jpg

programme.title: Poms
programme.desc: A great ensemble cast shows that you're never too old to follow your dreams. A group of elderly women from a retirement community form a cheerleading squad and enter a competition.

programme.title: It's Complicated
programme.desc: Meryl Streep, Steve Martin and Alec Baldwin star in this rom-com about a love triangle that sees a divorced woman have an affair with her ex-husband while dating another man.

programme.title: Lie Hard
programme.desc: A quirky comedy action. A pathological liar borrows money from a crime boss to buy a mansion to impress his girlfriend's parents, but problems arise when it's time to pay.

programme.title: Call Jane
programme.desc: A feel-good film about personal empowerment. The news of her pregnancy overjoys a housewife until she learns it threatens her life. However, legal circumstances complicate matters.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: A gripping retelling of a classic tale. The king's musketeers join forces with an eager recruit to protect France from a deadly plot.

programme.title: Black Warrant
programme.desc: Oscar nominee Tom Berenger stars in this action-packed thriller. A semi-retired assassin and DEA agent team up to stop a cyber terrorist organisation.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Dying For Chocolate
programme.desc: A book-inspired crime mystery. A caterer joins forces with a detective to solve the mysterious death of her friend.

programme.title: Invitation To A Murder
programme.desc: A murder mystery filled with twists. An aspiring detective and five other strangers are invited to a billionaire's remote island mansion, where one guest ends up dead.

programme.title: The Desperate Hour
programme.desc: Naomi Watts finds herself in a desperate race against time in this tense thriller. A recently widowed mother tries her utmost to reach her son when a shooting occurs at his school.

programme.title: Badges Of Fury
programme.desc: Martial arts legend Jet Li stars in this action comedy. A young detective is paired with his buddy cop to figure out who is responsible for a string of murders across Hong Kong.

programme.title: Austin Powers In Goldmember
programme.desc: Mike Myers returns as the grooviest super spy. This time he must save his kidnapped father by travelling back to 1975 to defeat the villainous team of Goldmember and Dr Evil.

programme.title: Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me
programme.desc: Mike Myers returns as the groovy spy in this sequel to the cult classic. Dr Evil is back with a new time machine that allows him to travel back in time to steal Austin Powers' mojo.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: Aaron Taylor-Johnson stars in this visually spectacular update of the monster classic, as he must save his loved ones from the raging battle between the two giant monsters.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts And Where To Find...
programme.desc: 'Fantastic Beasts And Where To Find Them'. JK Rowling takes us back into the wizarding world set in the 20s, where a young wizard travels to New York with a mysterious suitcase.

programme.title: 21 Bridges
programme.desc: The late, great Chadwick Boseman powers this crime thriller. As a detective leads a manhunt for two cop killers he is thrust into a massive and unexpected conspiracy.

programme.title: Shazam! Fury Of The Gods
programme.desc: Zachary Levi returns as Shazam in this hilarious sequel. While Billy and his foster siblings learn how to juggle their superhero lives, they face a vengeful trio of ancient gods.

programme.title: Terror Train
programme.desc: A contemporary remake of the 1980 slasher. A party train for a Halloween-themed bash turns into a nightmare as attendees are killed off one by one.

programme.title: Infamous
programme.desc: Bella Thorne leads this modern-day Bonnie and Clyde crime drama. The lust for internet fame drives a young couple on a dangerous crime spree riddled with police chases and murder.

programme.desc: Full View makes sense of all the news of the day. The show also features 30 minutes of market sense in-depth.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: Agenda breaks down the stories of the day, as set in Morning Live, in more detail and giving stories more substance as the story develops. These stories take news agenda forward.

programme.desc: 'S2/E45 - What Do It Do/Atlantis'. At last Candace finds a strange device in the yard and shows it to Mum, but it's not one of the boys' ones.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S2/E46 - Picture This/Nerdy Dancin''. Phineas and Ferb create a 'Go Getter' that can transport any item to their back yard - then discover it can transport them too.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S2/E47 - I Was a Middle-aged Robot/Suddenly Susy'. Candace is taking part in a series of Father and Daughter competitions, with the help of Doof's robot. Candace babysits Jeremy's little sister Susy.

programme.title: Walk The Prank
programme.desc: 'S2/E38 - Too Cool for High School'. When Bailey moves up a level in math, she takes a flying leap into the social-media obsessed world of high school.

programme.title: Walk The Prank
programme.desc: 'S2/E39 - End of the World (Wide Web)'. The gang is forced to endure reality for the first time when the city's internet goes down.

programme.title: Walk The Prank
programme.desc: 'S2/E40 - An Alarming Situation'. When a classroom goes up in flames, firefighters try to extinguish the fire, while several members of the gang try to extinguish some fiery truths.

programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Bad Energy'. When Vic says he needs Flashform's helmet, Amy and Colby must scramble to get it back from Milo. When the lair causes a big electric bill, the family must cover to Celia.

programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - We Don't Care'. After Amy and Hartley decide to use a villain song in a 'Battle of the Bands,' Eva forbids them. When a delivery person drops off Celia's new recliners, Vic gives them an upgrade.

programme.title: Pretty Freekin Scary
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Locker Life'. Frankie and Layla mutually 'break up,' and decide to no longer share a locker. However, finding a new locker proves difficult, so Frankie seeks help from the 'locker broker.'

programme.title: Pretty Freekin Scary
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Lunch Life'. Frankie and Layla want to get their band out of playing at Lunch Lady Doris' retirement party but she was the person who brought them together so they put aside their differences.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S4/E67 - Don't Trust the G in Apartment 4B'. Booker, Nia, Tess and Levi decide they're too old to trick-or-treat for Halloween this year and instead seek 'real scares' in the haunted apartment upstairs.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S4/E68 - Diff'rent Strikes'. When school is interrupted by a Chicago teachers' strike, Raven suggests the kids join a home study group.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S2/E35 - Let's Take a Quiz/At the Car Wash'. Candace is jealous when Jeremy is in a TV commercial as she wants to be on TV too. The boys help Isabella raise money for charity by building a car wash.

programme.title: Twist
programme.desc: A graffiti artist living on the streets is recruited by a slippery handler who has assembled a group of thieves to perform a series of art thefts.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn

programme.title: Ghost Nation

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Dual Pursuit'. Evidence of a cloaked Bigfoot leads the team to investigate near an abandoned mine. And Bryce stumbles across evidence of a possible missing person.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters
programme.desc: 'S6/E10 - Bigfoot On Camera'. The team meets a familiar face, who sheds light on what Trapper was doing in the Tygart Valley decades ago. And, they uncover explosive new evidence of Bigfoot.

programme.title: Haunting In The Heartland
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - I Am Red Death'. Steve heads to Greeneville, Tennessee, where a decades-long haunting resulted in tragedy. With the help of local law enforcement, he uncovers the town's dark past.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Evidence Revealed'. Nick, Katrina and fellow enthusiast, Aaron Sagers, recount their 72-hour investigations with unseen footage and in-depth evidence analysis.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Las Vegas'. Why was Las Vegas a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for Atomic Bombs, and a meeting place for 9/11's terrorists?

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S16/E9 - Rikers Island Rescue and More'. Don Wildman examines a fire hose linked to unlikely heroes. Plus, he investigates the story behind an iconic tongue twister and an unusual boat.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Grassman of Perry County'. Residents of Perry County have reported a Grassman seen in the woods. A group of hunters set out to catch the monster and make Appalachia safe once again.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: 'S107/E10 - Hem And Hanoi'. A world-travelling couple follows a job opportunity to live in Hanoi, Vietnam. He wants to live in a local community, but she craves the conveniences of the city.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: 'S107/E11 - Costa Rican Curriculum'. A Texas family leaves the comforts of the city to enjoy the culture and education in sunny Grecia, Costa Rica. Will they find the sanctuary they crave?

programme.title: Devil's Canyon
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. It's the final push before winter hits and season goals slip away. Pump problems for Boyce put his gold haul at risk, and Ben banks on his skills to survive.

programme.title: Gold Fever
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Eureka'. The Boston Company, a motley group of gold seekers including Dr. Charles Robinson, make the trek west to the gold fields. Meanwhile, entrepreneur Sam Brannan takes advantage.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S2/E25 - Badlands Bigfoot'. The team meets with witnesses from the Lakota Sioux, who claim Bigfoots roam the Pine Ridge Indian Reservation. But will they observe an all-important sighting?

programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Las Vegas'. Why was Las Vegas a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for Atomic Bombs, and a meeting place for 9/11's terrorists?

programme.title: Devil's Canyon
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. John's plans are derailed when a tree crushes his shelter. Ben finds the best dig site he's ever seen and Boyce's only shot at gold leaves him with dire options.

programme.title: Devil's Canyon
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Dead Men Get No Gold'. Ben's season may be saved with a kill, but gold proves elusive. John finds a promising dig site but his stamina is fading. Boyce must move 500lbs of gear.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S2/E26 - Bigfoot Hoedown'. The team investigate photographs from a young bigfooter that may depict a Sasquatch in his own backyard. Will the team find evidence to help to confirm his claims?

programme.title: Secrets Of The Underground
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - America's Buried Massacre'. Rob Nelson hunts for a mass grave that could expose a dark secret. Plus, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing and Rob set off to find out why.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown

programme.title: Gold Fever
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - San Francisco Burning'. The men of the Boston Company discover finding gold is more difficult than they imagined. Meanwhile, Sam's empire expands, but will a huge fire halt progress?

programme.title: Gold Fever
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Lawless'. Sam seizes power in fire-ravaged, lawless San Francisco, dealing out his own opportunistic brand of justice. Meanwhile, the men of Boston Company toil in the gold fields.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S2/E27 - Bigfoot And The Redhead'. The team meet with teenagers who may have filmed a Bigfoot whilst go karting. They deploy a unique search technique to try and elicit a sighting.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - American Nazis'. From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorised the USA in the 1930s.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S16/E10 - Beethoven's Mysterious Malady'. Don Wildman investigates the mysterious illness behind a composer's untimely death and a daring wartime rescue of 500 POWs.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Underground
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Rocky Mountain Monsters'. Rob examines bizarre markings that suggest a violent clash between prehistoric beasts. In California, he explores if a strange lake is a home to alien life.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Lost Spanish Fortune, Found!'. Josh Gates goes to the coast of Florida and Cuba in search of sunken treasure from a fleet of Spanish ships sunk in 1715.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters

programme.title: Destination Fear
